purpose: Provide a compact TWOS Runtime Status Update block that must be pasted back into LDD after meaningful TWOS/Codex progress.
backfeed_block_template:

Safety boundaries:
No frontend app, no customer-facing UI, no HTML/CSS/JS UI, no API server, no live endpoint, no external API, no broker/Binance connection, no live market data, no trading automation, no credential handling, no runtime mutation UI, no execution trigger.

Instruction for future LDD Review Sync:
Use this TWOS status as the latest runtime/product baseline unless a newer TWOS Runtime Status Update is provided.
routing_policy: LDD Review Sync is pasted into TWOS.
TWOS/Codex phase completion status must be pasted back into LDD.
The latest complete TWOS Runtime Status Update supersedes older phase/commit fragments.
Do not send partial add-on patches to Codex; regenerate complete instruction blocks.
validation_expectations: Protocol must include the full template, phase/checkpoint/mode fields, required fields, and routing policy.
